category_sources: Official nongnu.org man2html page describes the Perl program and CGI browser for system manpages.
source_facts.description says man2html converts nroff man pages to HTML.
display_name_sources: Official nongnu.org project page uses the name man2html.
docs_sources: Official nongnu.org man2html page is the project documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage identifies the official Savannah project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage identifies Savannah as the official project host.
source_facts.repo is empty, and the official nongnu.org man2html page links to the man2html CVS repository on Savannah.
tags_sources: Official nongnu.org page says man2html reads formatted nroff text and writes HTML, with a CGI program for browsing manpages.
source_facts.description identifies nroff man page to HTML conversion.
